trivia: The very light jet that actually worked: while VLJ startups collapsed around it, the little Mustang quietly delivered 479 airframes of honest, tiny jet. Production ended in 2017.
A jet smaller than many turboprops, often flown by its owner to places big enough for a bakery and a runway.
funFacts: One of the few very light jets to reach real market success.
